title: Elon Musk Possibly Violated Law With Voter Payout Claims
description: The bipartisan Wisconsin Elections Commission has found probable cause that the Tesla mogul broke state law when he promised to hand out $1 million checks to voters in the 2025 state Supreme Court election.

title: Elon Musk likely broke the law by giving voters $1 million, Wisconsin board says | CNN Politics
